md> ===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: teTeX/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz teTeX/tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.
md> ===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
md> => tetex-texmf-3.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/teTeX.

 Thanks for the report.  I fixed the URL just now, so please update
 your port tree and try again.  If the problem persists, please let me
 know.

--
| Hiroki SATO
